name: Input BAM
description: Coordinate-sorted BAM file and its corresponding index file (.bai). Both files must be provided so GATK can locate the index alongside the BAM.

name: Variant Resource VCF
description: bgzipped VCF of common germline variant sites with population allele frequencies (e.g. small_exac_common_3 or af-only-gnomad from the GATK resource bundle), plus its tabix index (.tbi). Both files must be provided.

name: Intervals
description: Genomic intervals file specifying which sites to include in the pileup (can be the same file as the variant VCF), plus its index file. Both files must be provided.

name: Output
description: Name for the output pileup summary table produced by GetPileupSummaries. This file is used as input to GATK CalculateContamination.

name: Advanced Options
description: Optional GATK arguments file for passing additional parameters to GetPileupSummaries that are not exposed as explicit module parameters.
